message:
feat(pager,wal): pager split-lock improvements and group commit expansion

- Expand pager with improved split-lock commit coordination and WAL
  backend separation (+86 lines)
- Expand group commit module with additional batching logic and fsync
  amortization (+57 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
